penalties.description: One rubber object dropped to trainer floor during pickup, required retrieval

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of object drop in frame 10 and retrieval process. All other transfers and placements clearly visible. Completion time well-observed from first pickup to final placement.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent completion time of 21 seconds. Single object drop penalty prevented perfect score. Smooth bimanual coordination throughout both forward and reverse transfer phases.
strengths: Excellent completion time well within expert range (21s vs 40-60s benchmark)
Clean midair transfers with minimal tremor
Good recovery technique after object drop
improvement_suggestions: Focus on secure initial grasp to prevent object drops
Consider slightly slower pickup speed to ensure reliable grasp before lifting
